IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE MARCH 1ST HEARING, THE CASE WILL BE OFF CALENDAR PER SETTLEMENT OF PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
